objective_function.formula: score(apt) = NEU_visits * dist(apt, NEU) + SUM_k [ min_j(dist(apt, dest_kj)) * visits_k ]
objective_function.unit: minutes (single-trip travel time via transit network)

metadata.data_source: Google Maps / Yelp / official store locators, March 2026
